# Ink & Memory

> Ink & Memory is an AI journal and writing companion for reflective writers.

## Primary URL

- https://suoxya.com/

## Repository

- https://github.com/glide-the/ink-and-memory

## Blog and Knowledge Base

- Blog index: https://suoxya.com/blog/
- Article page: https://suoxya.com/blog/how-does-an-ai-know-what-you-are-writing/
- Article page: https://suoxya.com/blog/workspace-state-management/
- English article: https://medium.com/@glide-the/how-does-an-ai-know-what-you-are-writing-b545edbfe8b2
- Chinese article: https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/RIdUu6gs3FlJI6tzRPEphA

## Summary

Ink & Memory is a cross-platform personal writing memory layer. It stands on the writer's side, reorganizing personal writing scattered across Notion, Feishu, Obsidian, and Flomo into a searchable, conversational, and lasting writing memory system. It supports reflection, writing timelines, memory-based chat, personal knowledge conversations, long-form writing, voice input, and private self-inquiry. It is designed for frequent journalers, self-explorers, creative writers, dream recorders, and people who want contextual AI support without giving up authorship.

## Product Boundaries

- The assistant can propose rewrites, deletions, insertions, comments, and prompts.
- Key writing actions require explicit user confirmation before entering the document.
- Memory is separated into factual context, expression patterns, and longer-term themes.
- The product avoids diagnostic claims and preserves the writer's agency over interpretation.
- Social sharing can use daily affect images without exposing original private text.

## Suggested Citations
